intro: Corynostylis aubletii, also known as Aublet's bush-pea or bush-pea, is a small tree or shrub native to the tropical regions of northern Australia and New Guinea. Traditionally, Corynostylis aubletii is used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties.
